metadata.description: Hypertaks Founder — multi-agent founder/CEO operating skill.

plugins.name: hypertaks
plugins.description: Founder/CEO-grade operating mode: sized intake gate, then a dynamically tiered team of specialist agents (1 / 3 / 5 / 6-10+) across strategy, engineering (incl. Solidity/Web3), marketing, finance, ERP, supply chain, and IoT.
